def: One of the numbers that tells where a point sits on the grid.
example: In (3, 5), the numbers 3 and 5 are the coordinates.

def: How far apart two points are, counted in grid units. It is never less than zero.
Going left and right, flat across the grid.
example: Points with the same up number sit on a horizontal line.

def: Going straight up and down on the grid.
example: Points with the same across number sit on a vertical line.
